message:
fix: Enable h2 on Linux - fix metal0 netpoller comptime_int bug

The issue was in metal0's epollAdd function where a switch on runtime
value 'op' produced comptime_int type. Zig 0.15 is stricter about this.

Fixed by extracting switch result to typed local variable:
  const base_event: u32 = switch (op) { ... };

Reverted all h2 disable workarounds - now works on all platforms.
